pages.text: Combat spellcaster class. Crafts wands, staves, robes, and spell books across three schools: arcane, fire, and frost. One Mage casts all three; the class does not subdivide.$(br2)Robes use the school's signature block — lapis (Wizard), amethyst (Arcane), magma (Fire), prismarine (Frost). Netherite, ruby, and smaragdant wand and staff variants stay vanilla smithing-table upgrades from the base wands.
